series_metadata.series_description: The Board receives verification of education and criminal record report results to support application requirements.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: 14 days from time electronic file is provided board ; Paper: no paper files are retained in office. all paper transcripts are uploaded electronic system. ; Electronic: in licensing and document management system a period of one year. that period of time records may be destroyed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Erase ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
